## Public Notes

Build the GOOL/GOAL packet around public OpenGOAL materials, creator testimony, legal-copy asset boundaries, and clean-room tooling notes.

## Inputs

- OpenGOAL public docs
- OpenGOAL source records
- creator article

## Outputs

- standalone archival packet
- clean-room tooling map
- asset-boundary notes
